creator: jimmy@mammothcheese.ca
text:
That patch is not quite right.  Here we go again:

diff -ruN /usr/ports/www/drood/distinfo ./drood/distinfo
--- /usr/ports/www/drood/distinfo       2009-01-02 11:20:52.000000000 -0500
+++ ./drood/distinfo    2009-01-06 17:17:27.000000000 -0500
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-MD5 (drood-1.38.tar.gz) = 33000c4d2f3c46da5223ecd912333896
-SHA256 (drood-1.38.tar.gz) = 
be57e25bce987b56a85993cbe97c70763d396d7d38cd2f43b1d2687f88c54513
-SIZE (drood-1.38.tar.gz) = 36329
+MD5 (drood-1.38.tar.gz) = a7f4568b056b1e5af89b2e296ada71ec
+SHA256 (drood-1.38.tar.gz) = 
17949d992275899130bbb6add8195a9cd858b7f185161c18a47d0d205f5d71d9
+SIZE (drood-1.38.tar.gz) = 36522
